summary: Revenue Tracking feature testing complete. All 18 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. Revenue tracking is now connected to real MongoDB data with full CRUD operations - NO MOCKED APIs.

warnings.description: WebSocket notification connection fails on page load - not related to Revenue Tracking feature
warnings.details: WebSocket connection to /api/ws/notifications fails - this is a pre-existing issue

critical_code_review_comments: Revenue tracking service properly excludes MongoDB _id from responses
All endpoints properly require authentication (returns 401/403 without token)
Auto-seeding of demo data works correctly for new users
Frontend properly displays all data: total revenue, platforms, sources, monthly trend, top content
Record Revenue form submits correctly and updates overview in real-time
Transactions filtering by platform_id and source works correctly
Platform detail view shows breakdown and recent transactions
data-testid attributes are properly implemented for all interactive elements
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 12 months of demo data across 10 platforms when user has no revenue records
context_for_next_testing_agent: Revenue Tracking feature fully tested. Test credentials: owner@bigmannentertainment.com / Test1234!. Auth returns 'access_token' not 'token'. Finance dropdown in navigation includes Revenue Tracking link. All revenue endpoints require Bearer token auth.

backend_apis.GET /api/revenue/overview: PASS - Returns total_revenue, by_platform, by_source, monthly_trend, top_earning_content
backend_apis.GET /api/revenue/transactions: PASS - Returns paginated list with filtering by platform_id and source
backend_apis.POST /api/revenue/record: PASS - Creates new revenue entry, appears in transactions and updates overview
backend_apis.GET /api/revenue/platform/{platform_id}: PASS - Returns detailed breakdown for specific platform
backend_apis.Authentication: PASS - All endpoints require valid JWT token (401/403 without)
backend_apis.Data Integrity: PASS - No MongoDB _id in responses, totals match transaction sums

frontend_ui.Overview tab: PASS - Total revenue, this month, platforms count, transactions count, monthly trend chart, source pie chart, top earning content
frontend_ui.Platforms tab: PASS - Platform cards with revenue breakdown, click to see detail panel
frontend_ui.Transactions tab: PASS - Filterable transaction list with platform and source filters
frontend_ui.Record Revenue form: PASS - Platform select, source select, amount input, content title, description, submit button
frontend_ui.Navigation: PASS - Finance dropdown includes Revenue Tracking link

mocked_data_note: NO MOCKED APIs - All revenue endpoints are connected to real MongoDB data
